questions.q: In which 1957 epic film did Nargis play the iconic title role of a long-suffering peasant mother?
questions.explanation: Nargis played the title role of Radha in Mehboob Khan's 1957 epic Mother India.

questions.q: Nargis is most famously associated as the leading lady opposite which iconic Hindi film actor and showman?
questions.explanation: Nargis formed one of Indian cinema's most celebrated screen pairs with Raj Kapoor in films like Awaara and Shree 420.

questions.q: In which year was Nargis born?
questions.explanation: Nargis was born on 1 June 1929 in Calcutta.

questions.q: Nargis was the first Indian actress to be honoured with which civilian award by the Government of India?
questions.explanation: Nargis became the first actress to receive the Padma Shri, which she was awarded in 1958.

questions.q: Which actor, who played her on-screen son in Mother India, did Nargis later marry in real life?
questions.explanation: Nargis married Sunil Dutt, who had played her son Birju in Mother India, in 1958.

questions.q: In which 1951 Raj Kapoor classic did Nargis star opposite him in a famous courtroom drama?
questions.explanation: Nargis starred opposite Raj Kapoor in the hugely successful 1951 film Awaara.

questions.q: In which 1955 Raj Kapoor film, featuring the song 'Pyar Hua Ikrar Hua', did Nargis play the female lead?
questions.explanation: Nargis played the leading lady Vidya in Raj Kapoor's 1955 film Shree 420.

questions.q: Nargis was primarily an actress in which industry of Indian cinema?
questions.explanation: Nargis was a leading actress of Hindi cinema during the 1940s and 1950s.

questions.q: What was Nargis's birth name before she adopted her screen name?
questions.explanation: Nargis was born Fatima Rashid and took the screen name Nargis early in her career.

questions.q: In which decade did Nargis pass away?
questions.explanation: Nargis died on 3 May 1981, in the 1980s.

questions.q: Mother India (1957), starring Nargis, was India's first film to be nominated for which international award?
options: The Golden Globe for Best Picture
The Academy Award for Best Foreign Language Film
questions.explanation: Mother India became the first Indian film nominated for the Academy Award for Best Foreign Language Film.

questions.q: Which filmmaker directed Mother India, the 1957 epic in which Nargis played Radha?
questions.explanation: Mother India was directed by Mehboob Khan, who had earlier made its predecessor Aurat.

questions.q: Nargis was the daughter of which celebrated singer and performer of early Indian cinema and theatre?
questions.explanation: Nargis was the daughter of the singer and filmmaker Jaddanbai, herself a pioneer of early Indian cinema.

questions.q: For which 1957 film did Nargis win the Filmfare Award for Best Actress?
questions.explanation: Nargis won the Filmfare Best Actress award for her performance as Radha in Mother India.

questions.q: Nargis made her debut as a child actress in the 1935 film Talash-e-Haq under which screen name?
questions.explanation: She first appeared as a child performer credited as 'Baby Nargis' in the 1935 film Talash-e-Haq.

questions.q: Nargis was nominated to which house of the Indian Parliament in 1980?
questions.explanation: Nargis was nominated to the Rajya Sabha, the upper house of Parliament, in 1980.

questions.q: Which 1949 Mehboob Khan film paired Nargis with both Dilip Kumar and Raj Kapoor?
questions.explanation: Nargis starred alongside Dilip Kumar and Raj Kapoor in Mehboob Khan's 1949 hit Andaz.

questions.q: In the 1956 comedy Chori Chori, Nargis starred opposite Raj Kapoor in a story adapted from which Hollywood film?
questions.explanation: Chori Chori (1956) was an adaptation of the Hollywood classic It Happened One Night.

questions.q: Nargis became the very first winner of the National Film Award for Best Actress for her performance in which 1967 film?
questions.explanation: Nargis was the inaugural recipient of the National Film Award for Best Actress, won for Raat Aur Din (1967).

questions.q: Nargis's son, who became a leading Hindi film actor, is named what?
questions.explanation: Nargis's son with Sunil Dutt, actor Sanjay Dutt, made his film debut in 1981.

questions.q: Many of the Nargis-Raj Kapoor classics were produced under which film banner founded by Raj Kapoor?
questions.explanation: Films such as Awaara and Shree 420 were produced under Raj Kapoor's R.K. Films banner.

questions.q: In the 1967 film Raat Aur Din, Nargis portrayed a woman suffering from which condition?
questions.explanation: In Raat Aur Din, Nargis played a woman with a dual or split personality, a role that earned her national recognition.

questions.q: In which city was Nargis born in 1929?
questions.explanation: Nargis was born in Calcutta, though she rose to fame in the Bombay film industry.

questions.q: Nargis's first leading adult role came in which 1943 Mehboob Khan film?
questions.explanation: Nargis got her first adult lead role in Mehboob Khan's Taqdeer (1943), opposite Motilal.

questions.q: During the filming of Mother India, Sunil Dutt rescued Nargis from which on-set danger?
questions.explanation: Sunil Dutt rescued Nargis from a fire that broke out during the shooting of Mother India, which drew them together.

questions.q: Mother India was a colour remake of which earlier 1940 black-and-white film by Mehboob Khan?
questions.explanation: Mother India (1957) was a remake of Mehboob Khan's own 1940 film Aurat.

questions.q: Which 1967 release is regarded as Nargis's last film in a leading role?
questions.explanation: Raat Aur Din (1967) is regarded as Nargis's final film as a leading actress.

questions.q: In her memory, the National Film Awards instituted the Nargis Dutt Award for the best feature film promoting what?
questions.explanation: The Nargis Dutt Award honours the best feature film on national integration.

questions.q: Nargis was a founding figure associated with which spastics and disability welfare cause in Mumbai?
options: The National Association for the Blind
questions.explanation: Nargis was a patron and active supporter of the Spastics Society of India, championing disability welfare.

questions.q: Nargis died in 1981 just days before which major family event took place?
options: The premiere of son Sanjay Dutt's debut film Rocky
questions.explanation: Nargis died on 3 May 1981, just days before the premiere of her son Sanjay Dutt's debut film Rocky.
